items.title: Heybike offers early-bird launch deal on its Saturn moped-style e-bike with two battery options + $168 FREE bundle from $999
items.summary:
Following the Juiced Scrambler and Lectric XPress2 e-bike launches, Heybike is joining the parade with its own early-bird pre-launch deal on its latest Saturn Moped-Style e-bike. This new e-bike comes with a $168 FREE bundle of gear and two battery choices: a single-battery configuration down at $999 shipped, while the dual-battery configuration is down at $1,299 shipped. These two configurations are seeing $100 discounts from their $1,099 and $1,399 MSRPs that will be carried after this deal ends, with the added bundle package giving you $268 in total savings. The bundle contains a pair of model-specific mirrors ($69 value) alongside a 5th Anniversary gift box ($99 value). You can learn more about this new affordable ride below, or you can browse the brand’s ongoing Anniversary Sale on its other e-bikes here.

Buy for $31 (Reg. $56)

Apply JG4A9XIV during checkout.

What we love

This ORICO M.2 2230 NVMe SSD enclosure features a compact aluminum shell that attaches to the back of your phone. What makes it stand out is that it also doubles as a mini USB-C hub, offering 100W PD passthrough, 10Gb/s USB-C and USB-A ports, 4K@60Hz HDMI output, and a 3.5mm audio jack. items.title: Best Buy Memorial Day sale: Up to 40% off Bluetooth speakers from Beats, JBL, Marshall, more with deals from just $15
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Memorial Day sale, Best Buy is serving up a wide range of notable discounts on Bluetooth speakers across multiple categories. We’re tracking deals on everything from compact portable speakers and rugged travel-friendly models to larger party speakers and tower-style setups from brands like JBL, Beats, Sony, and so on. You can save up to 40% by cashing in some of these deals, and the prices are starting at just $14.99 shipped. Whether you’re after a small speaker to toss into a backpack or a larger setup for backyard gatherings and parties, there are plenty of good options to pick from, and we’ve highlighted some of our favorites below.

items.title: This Lenovo 5-in-1 USB-C hub turns one port into 5 with 4K HDMI, 90W PD, more at just $22 today
items.summary:
Lenovo 5-in-1 USB-C hub

Buy for $22 (Reg. $30)

What we love

Compact USB-C hubs like this Lenovo model can be a great middle ground if you’re looking to add some more ports to your laptop setup without spending big on a full-fledged Thunderbolt dock. This Lenovo 5-in-1 USB-C hub offers a practical selection of ports in a portable form factor, including an HDMI output with support for up to 4K at 60Hz for external displays, 90W USB-C Power Delivery pass-through to keep your laptop charged, along with dual USB-A and a USB-C connection for accessories and data transfers.

items.title: Grab Baseus’ X1 Pro dual-tracking wireless outdoor solar security camera at its $150 low or with a 32GB card at a new $157 low
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, Baseus is currently offering returning and new low prices on the X1 Pro Dual-Tracking Wireless Outdoor Solar Security Camera starting at $149.99 shipped, or you can score its bundle with a 32GB microSD card for $157.49 shipped. The standalone camera has been mostly keeping down between $170 and $160 recently from its full $270 pricing (with occasional falls to the $150 low), while the micoSD card bundle has been slowly cascading down from its $280 rate since April, having previously only gone as low as $175. Now, you’re looking at a return $120 markdown on the camera and a $123 markdown on the bundle for the best prices we have tracked since hitting the market at the top of the year.

items.summary:

This is a new model that just hit the scene carrying a $100 price tag. It’s now going for $20 less with a launch deal – something we’ve come to expect from many of LISEN’s new product releases – landing as the first notable offer on this model and marking a new best price to beat. It’s one of the more feature-packed battery packs out there, complete with support for Qi2.2 25W wireless charging, and more, and you can learn more about it below.
